zh.Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery於大約1088年出生在法國時，他的父親Baron Etienne III de Boulers45歲，母親Mrs Stephen de Boerlare44歲。他和Sybil de Falaise至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1112年之後在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利。

zh-hans.Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery于大约1088年出生在法国时，他的父亲Baron Etienne III de Boulers45岁，母亲Mrs Stephen de Boerlare44岁。他和Sybil de Falaise至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1112年之后在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Boulers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Bowler  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Bowler
meanings: English (mainly East Midlands): occupational name from an unrecorded Middle English word boler ‘worker at a bole or lead-mining site’ (Middle English bole ‘bowl’), here denoting a round cavity on top of a high hill, where lead was smelted.

English: occupational name from Middle English bollere, boler, bolour, bulour ‘maker or seller of bowls, dishes, or cups’ (from Old English bolla ‘bowl, drinking vessel’ + the agent suffix -er, and Old French bole, bule ‘bowl’). Medieval bowls were made of wood as well as of earthenware.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery was born about 1088, in France, his father, Baron Etienne III de Boulers, was 45 and his mother, Mrs Stephen de Boerlare, was 44. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Sybil de Falaise. He died after 1112, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery est né environ 1088, à France, son père, Baron Etienne III de Boulers, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mrs Stephen de Boerlare, avait 44 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Sybil de Falaise. Il est décédé après 1112, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery um 1088 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Etienne III de Boulers 45 und seine Mutter Mrs Stephen de Boerlare 44. Er hatte mit Sybil de Falaise mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1112 in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery è nato il circa 1088 nel Francia, il suo padre, Baron Etienne III de Boulers, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Stephen de Boerlare, aveva 44 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Sybil de Falaise. Morì dopo il 1112, nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles.

ja.1080: から1080年1月7日まで1081年1月6日
ja.Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales: ウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリー
ja.Haworth Castle, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアハウオルス
ja.Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーvラアンデレン
ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomeryが約1088年にフランスで生まれた時，父Baron Etienne III de Boulersは45歳，母Mrs Stephen de Boerlareは44歳であった。彼はSybil de Falaiseとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1112年以後にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery(이)가 대략 1088년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Etienne III de Boulers(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Stephen de Boerlare(은)는 44세였다. 그는 Sybil de Falaise(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1112년 이후 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 사망했다.

lv.1080: no 1080. gada 7. janvāra līdz 1081. gada 6. janvārim

mn.1080: 1080 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 7-аас 1081 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 6 хүртэл

pt.1080: de 7 de janeiro de 1080 a 6 de janeiro de 1081
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery nasceu aproximadamente 1088, em França, seu pai, Baron Etienne III de Boulers, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Stephen de Boerlare, tinha 44 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Sybil de Falaise. Ele faleceu após 1112, em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery родился около 1088 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Baron Etienne III de Boulers было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Stephen de Boerlare, 44. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Sybil de Falaise. Он умер после 1112 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс.

sm.Abt 1088–after 1112: e tusa o le 1088–ina ua ma'ea le 1112
sm.1080: mai le 7 Ianuari 1080 e o'o I le 6 Ianuari 1081

es.1080: desde 7 de enero de 1080 hasta 6 de enero de 1081
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery nació aproximadamente 1088, en Francia, su papá, Baron Etienne III de Boulers, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Mrs Stephen de Boerlare, tenía 44 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Sybil de Falaise. Murió después de 1112, en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales.
